featureTitle: Phase 15B: Enterprise Hardening — VistA-first Security + Prompts Repair
highlights: Auth gateway: path-based session/admin/public endpoint gating
CORS lockdown: origin allowlist replaces origin:true
Response scrubber: centralized sanitization of all error messages
Session fixation prevention: rotateSession on login
Token removed from login response body (cookie-only)
Audit actor attribution: real session user replaces { duz: system }
Prompts directory ordering fixed (no duplicate folder 12)
console.log replaced with structured logger in write-backs
